rationale: Top-of-baseline refining play: extreme cheapness plus strong analyst revisions, even with soft price momentum.

name: ICICI BANK LTD.
rationale: Best-in-class private bank — core financial anchor; sized up versus the rest of the bank book.

name: THE GE SHPG.LTD
rationale: Rare triple-positive: strong momentum, cheap, and rising revisions all align.

rationale: Large-cap iron-ore at fair value with positive momentum and strong revisions.

name: HINDALCO  INDUSTRIES  LTD
rationale: Already held; cheap large-cap metal with positive momentum and firming revisions — keep.

rationale: Best-in-class analyst revisions among large financials, only mildly cheap, modest momentum drag — a revisions-led re-rating bet.

name: NATIONAL ALUMINIUM CO LTD
rationale: Strong momentum aluminium name with rising revisions; commodity tailwind.

name: HDFC BANK LTD
rationale: Core large private bank; weak momentum and soft revisions argue for keeping it as a market-weight anchor, not an overweight.

rationale: Gold-loan NBFC with strong rising revisions; momentum soft but franchise and gold tailwind support.

name: RELIANCE INDUSTRIES LTD
rationale: Cheap diversified large-cap (energy + retail + telecom optionality); soft momentum but deep franchise — keep as anchor.

name: COAL INDIA LTD
rationale: Cheap large-cap energy with positive momentum, rising revisions and a high dividend — fits the defensive-cyclical sleeve.

name: INFOSYS LIMITED
rationale: Large-cap IT anchor; weak momentum offset by franchise and fair value — keep as defensive ballast.

name: STATE BANK OF INDIA
rationale: Cheap PSU bank anchor; soft revisions cap the size but valuation and franchise justify a hold.

name: NTPC LTD
rationale: Core low-beta power utility, cheap with mildly positive momentum and modestly firming revisions — defensive ballast.

name: INDUSIND BANK LIMITED
rationale: Beaten-down private bank where revisions are now firming and valuation is cheap — a recovery bet.

name: COFORGE LIMITED
rationale: Mid/large IT with strong analyst revisions despite weak recent price momentum — keep on revisions.

name: BHARTI AIRTEL LIMITED
rationale: Structural telecom leader with pricing power; soft near-term momentum but durable franchise — keep.

rationale: Strong analyst revisions on a diversified large-cap holdco (VSF + cement + paints optionality).

rationale: Reasonably valued private bank with neutral-to-firming revisions — keep as part of a diversified bank book.

rationale: Cheap steel name with strong price momentum and steady revisions — adds ferrous cyclicality.
